chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI SMA. NO.22/2018 Date Order with signature of Judge FOR HEARING OF CMA.560/2019 02.05.2019 Mr. Shahzaib Akhtar Khan advocate for petitioner ---------------------------------- Through the listed application under section 376 of the Succession Act, 1925 (CMA No.560 of 2019) the petitioner seeks to extend succession certificate, already granted, vide order dated 30.04.2018, to include the payment of compensation granted by PIA in the amount of Rs.5,000,000/= to the legal heirs of the deceased Junaid Jamshed Khan. Learned counsel further submits that after filing of listed application the process as per rule has been completed and refers diary sheet of Deputy Registrar (O.S.) dated 18.04.2019. From the record, it appears that the above petition was filed in respect of the immovable and movable properties left by the deceased namely Junaid Jamshed Khan and was granted by this Court on 30.04.2018. After the grant of above petition, the petitioner came to know about the amount of compensation mentioned in listed application upon which the listed application has been filed. The petitioner in support of his application has filed affidavits of no objection of the legal heirs of the deceased and fresh publication was also affected in the daily Jang Karachi dated 28.03.2019. From the record, it also appears that the office has complied with the required formalities in respect of the present application including publication, however, no objection has been received to oppose the said application, therefore, there appears no impediment in granting the listed application.

The petitioner in support of his application has filed affidavits of no objection of the legal heirs of the deceased and fresh publication was also affected in the daily Jang Karachi dated 28.03.2019. From the record, it also appears that the office has complied with the required formalities in respect of the present application including publication, however, no objection has been received to oppose the said application, therefore, there appears no impediment in granting the listed application. Accordingly, the application (CMA No.560 of 2019) is allowed and the Succession Certificate earlier granted is extended as prayed. The office is directed to issue extension Certificate as per rules upon execution of the Personal Bond to the satisfaction of this Nazir of the Court. The listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI P.A
